problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
